nasb.text: For behold, our fathers have fallen by the sword, and our sons and our daughters and our wives are in captivity for this.

esv.text: For behold, our fathers have fallen by the sword, and our sons and our daughters and our wives are in captivity for this.

cnv.text: 所以我們的列祖倒在刀下；我們的兒女和妻子也都因此作了俘虜。

ccb.text: 所以我们的祖先死在刀下，我们的妻儿也被掳去。
